sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12078" key="a)pho/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπηόριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq., <sense id="n12078.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hanging,</tr_> of branches, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
